headline: These Investors Earned 20% to 33% Returns Using The Same Philosophy on Completely Different Stocks
summary: The Investing for Beginners Podcast recently revisited one of the most influential ideas in modern finance. That was Benjamin Graham’s concept of buying with a margin of safety. In fact, according to host Andrew Sather, Graham’s Columbia students went on to compound capital at extraordinary rates using the same principles applied to wildly different portfolios. ... These Investors Earned 20% to 33% Returns Using The Same Philosophy on Completely Different Stocks

headline: American Express Headquarters Shift To 2 World Trade Center And Valuation
summary: American Express (NYSE:AXP) plans to relocate its global headquarters to a new skyscraper at 2 World Trade Center in New York City. The new headquarters is designed to accommodate up to 10,000 employees and serve as a hub for technology, sustainability, and employee experience. The move reflects a long term investment in the company’s future presence and operations in a key global financial center. For investors tracking NYSE:AXP, the relocation sits alongside the company’s core focus on...
